title: GA4 Measurement Protocol provider config
description: Configuration shape for a Google Analytics 4 Measurement Protocol integration.

api_secret.description: GA4 Measurement Protocol API secret. Generated in the GA4 Admin > Data Streams > Web > Measurement Protocol API secrets pane. Encrypted at rest.

firebase_app_id.description: For app-stream integrations (mobile). When present, dispatches use the app-specific endpoint. Format: 1:XXXX:web:XXXX or 1:XXXX:android:XXXX.

default_currency.description: Fallback ISO 4217 currency for events that don't carry a value_currency.

engagement_time_msec_default.description: GA4 requires an engagement_time_msec on every event to trigger user_engagement. Default 100ms.

debug_endpoint.description: true = dispatch to https://www.google-analytics.com/debug/mp/collect (validates payload + returns validation errors, does NOT record the event). Used for provider test mode. false = production endpoint.
